name: codex-intercom
description: Codex MCP plugin and bridge daemon for local Pi/Codex intercom messaging.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate local Codex and Pi sessions
interface.longDescription: Codex Intercom provides direct 1:1 local messaging for coding-agent sessions through MCP tools, plus an optional Codex app-server bridge that exposes wake-on-message virtual workers backed by persistent app-server threads.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Intercom to coordinate with another local coding-agent session
